project.name: musik-kita-ops
project.description: Studio music school administration and finance management system — student registration, scheduling, attendance, invoicing, payments, teacher honoraria, and events for ~300 students and 18 teachers

nodes.name: ClassSession.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for concrete class sessions per date (M03/M04). Tracks attendance status, honor codes, split session parts, session sequencing, and attribution month/year for honor calculations.
nodes.languageNotes: session_date deliberately not cast to Carbon; uses Carbon::parse() for date operations to support string comparisons on collections.

nodes.name: AttendanceService.php
nodes.summary: Core attendance recording service (M04) implementing BR-4 business rules. Calculates per-session honor based on attendance status with support for substitute teachers, split sessions, and Kids Class flat rates.

nodes.name: DiscountService
nodes.summary: Service handling invoice discount application and removal (NOMINAL/PERCENT types) with audit logging and status recalc.
nodes.languageNotes: Supports both NOMINAL (Rp flat) and PERCENT (capped at 90% for SPP) discounts with validation against existing discounts.

nodes.name: InvoicePdfService
nodes.summary: Service generating A4 PDF invoices via DomPDF with proper filename and caption formatting.

nodes.name: InvoiceService
nodes.summary: Core billing service handling SPP auto-generation per active enrollment, one-off invoices (REG/CUTI/UJI/MC/KIDS_FP), Kids Bundle 3-installment plan, daily late fines, invoice void, and status recalculation.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements BR-MK.4 by generating separate SPP invoices per enrollment, not per student.

nodes.name: PaymentService
nodes.summary: Service handling payment recording with receipt number generation (KW/YYYY/MM/NNNN) and payment void operations.

nodes.name: StudentLifecycleService
nodes.summary: Central student lifecycle service implementing the 6-status state machine (Calon/Trial/Aktif/Cuti/Selesai/Mundur) with enrollment management, invoice generation, session cleanup, and audit history recording.
nodes.languageNotes: All status transitions go through DB transactions ensuring consistency between student status, enrollments, sessions, and audit logs.

nodes.name: WablasService
nodes.summary: Wablas API integration service handling phone normalization, text messaging, PDF document sending, and error categorization.

nodes.name: applyDiscount
nodes.summary: Applies a NOMINAL or PERCENT discount to an invoice item with validation (max 90% PERCENT for SPP, no discount on discount items, amount not exceeding parent), audit logging, and invoice status recalc.

nodes.name: removeDiscount
nodes.summary: Removes an existing discount from invoice item within DB transaction, recalculates invoice status, and logs to audit.

nodes.name: generateNumber
nodes.summary: Generates sequential invoice number INV/YYYY/MM/NNNN with monthly sequence reset.

nodes.name: createOneOff
nodes.summary: Creates a one-time invoice (REG, CUTI, UJI, MC, KIDS_FP, SPP) with items, auto-generates invoice number, sets due date, and wraps in DB transaction.

nodes.name: generateMonthlySPP
nodes.summary: Auto-generates SPP invoices on 1st of each month for all active students with active enrollments, creating one invoice per enrollment per BR-MK.4.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements BR-MK.4: iterates each active enrollment independently, skipping only TRIAL/ON_LEAVE/COMPLETED status enrollments.

nodes.name: voidInvoice
nodes.summary: Voids an invoice if no valid payments exist, setting status to VOID with timestamp and reason.

nodes.name: recalcStatus
nodes.summary: Recalculates invoice status (UNPAID/PARTIAL/PAID) based on total_amount and paid_amount from valid payments.

nodes.name: applyLateFinesForMonth
nodes.summary: Applies daily late fines (Rp 5.000/day from 11th) to unpaid invoices for a given month, creating or updating DENDA items as needed.

nodes.name: createKidsBundleInstallments
nodes.summary: Creates 3 installment invoices for Kids Class bundle with split amounts and shared installment_group_id UUID.

nodes.name: sppInvoiceExistsForEnrollment
nodes.summary: Checks if an SPP invoice already exists for a specific enrollment/month to prevent duplicate generation.

nodes.name: recordPayment
nodes.summary: Records a payment against an invoice with receipt number generation, stores proof image metadata, and recalculates invoice status.

nodes.name: voidPayment
nodes.summary: Voids a payment if not already voided, sets voided_at/voided_by, and recalculates invoice status.

nodes.name: generateReceiptNumber
nodes.summary: Generates sequential receipt number KW/YYYY/MM/NNNN with monthly sequence reset.

nodes.name: sendReminder
nodes.summary: Sends a WhatsApp reminder to a student with composed message and optional PDF attachments for each unpaid invoice.

nodes.name: sendBatch
nodes.summary: Sends batch WhatsApp reminders for multiple students, processing one by one with error handling and Wablas error categorization.

nodes.name: getUnpaidGroupedByStudent
nodes.summary: Queries unpaid invoices, groups by student with balance/phone/reminder history, and filters by last reminder time for frequency control.

nodes.name: composeMessage
nodes.summary: Composes a WhatsApp reminder message by replacing template placeholders with student and invoice data.

nodes.name: mulaiTrial
nodes.summary: Starts a trial session for a student (Calon -> Trial): creates enrollment with TRIAL status, generates a 30-minute trial session, and records audit history.

nodes.name: konversiAktif
nodes.summary: Converts a trial student to Active (Trial -> Aktif): closes trial enrollment, opens new active enrollment with schedule, generates activation invoice.

nodes.name: skipTrial
nodes.summary: Skips trial and directly activates a student (Calon -> Aktif): validates skip reason, opens enrollment, generates activation invoice with registration fee, records history.

nodes.name: ajukanCuti
nodes.summary: Processes leave request (Aktif -> Cuti): validates max leave period (2 months, extension 1x), sets enrollment ON_LEAVE, cancels future sessions, generates leave invoice.

nodes.name: mundurkan
nodes.summary: Marks a student as withdrawn: closes all active and trial enrollments, cancels scheduled sessions, records history.

nodes.name: selesai
nodes.summary: Completes a student (Kids Class graduation): validates no unpaid invoices remain, closes active enrollments, records history.

nodes.name: aktifkanKembali
nodes.summary: Re-activates a withdrawn/completed student: validates unpaid invoice awareness, closes old enrollments, opens new enrollment with registration fee invoice.

nodes.name: aktifkanDariCuti
nodes.summary: Returns a student from leave (Cuti -> Aktif): clears leave dates, reactivates enrollments, records history.

nodes.name: issueActivationInvoice
nodes.summary: Generates activation invoice with SPP (and optionally REG fee), handling REGULER/HOBBY/DUO packages and KIDS_CLASS_BUNDLE installments.

nodes.name: openEnrollment
nodes.summary: Creates an ACTIVE enrollment for a student, closes existing active enrollments first, and sets as primary.

nodes.name: renderPdf
nodes.summary: Renders an invoice as A4 portrait PDF using DomPDF with eager-loaded items and payments.

nodes.name: post
nodes.summary: Sends HTTP POST to Wablas API with authorization, handles response parsing, extracts message ID, and categorizes errors.

nodes.name: normalizePhone
nodes.summary: Normalizes Indonesian phone numbers: strips non-digits, handles 0/62 prefixes, validates minimum length.

nodes.name: sendDocumentFromLocal
nodes.summary: Sends a PDF document via Wablas API by encoding bytes as base64 with filename and caption.

Covers migration, model changes, generator service, reschedule service, controller eager-loading, and UI label display across 3 views.

nodes.name: 2026-05-24-split-reschedule.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for splitting a 30-minute IZIN_RESCHEDULE session into two 15-minute parts, each with split honor. Adds split_part column, H_SPLIT honor code, StoreSplitPartRequest, AbsensiController endpoint, and modal UI for Part 2 creation.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-dashboard-admin-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for simplifying the Admin dashboard by removing financial widgets (Saldo Kas, Aging Piutang, Slip Honor) and replacing student statistics with today's attendance list. Uses conditional rendering in Blade via $isAdmin flag.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-honor-guru-pendamping.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for injecting automatic Rp 250,000 honor for accompanying teachers at Konser KITA events via a new EventHonorService. Adds H_PENDAMPING payroll config, service integration in EventController::complete(), and flash message display.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-kids-class-import.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding a 'Generate Cicilan Bundle' button on student detail pages to create 3 installment invoices for KIDS_CLASS_BUNDLE students imported from Excel. Includes route, InvoiceController::generateBundle(), and blade modal.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-nickname-unique.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for preventing duplicate student nicknames via two layers of enforcement: a UNIQUE index migration on students.nickname and updated Form Request validation rules in StoreStudentRequest and UpdateStudentRequest.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-uat-user-manual.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for generating two .docx deliverables using Python + python-docx: a UAT Checklist with ~70 scenarios across modules M01-M08 and an Admin User Manual with 5 chapters of step-by-step operational instructions.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-duo-class.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding a DUO class type (2 students, 1 teacher) to the system. Covers enum migration, Package::isDuo(), DUO-aware conflict detection bypass, H_DUO honor calculation, seeder entries for 7 DUO packages, and badge display in UI.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-guru-login.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for building the Guru (teacher) login portal with Spatie role, user_id FK on teachers table, artisan account creation command, mobile-first GuruLayout with bottom nav, dashboard for today's sessions, 2-week schedule view, and read-only honor slips.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-izin-pending-open-slot.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding IZIN_PENDING status to class_sessions enum, enabling admin to record student absences without immediate replacement date. Includes Open Slot Board for admin to assign open slots and a teacher pending sessions page in the guru portal.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-pisah-metode-bayar-laporan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for displaying 4 separate payment method rows (CASH, TRANSFER, QRIS, DEBIT) in finance reports. Replaces inaccurate $revenueTransfer = $totalRevenue - $revenueCash calculation with a groupBy('method') query in ReportController.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-user-management.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for creating a /users management page enabling Owner to manage all login accounts (Owner/Admin/Auditor/Guru) via a single-page list with Alpine.js modals. Adds is_active column to users table, UserController with 6 endpoints, and 3 Form Requests.

nodes.name: 2026-05-29-kids-fp-invoice.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding a 'Generate KIDS_FP Invoice' button on student detail pages to create the Rp 140,000 Final Project invoice for KIDS_CLASS students. Includes InvoiceController::generateKidsFp(), route, blade badge/tombol/modal, and double-generate guard.

nodes.name: 2026-05-29-laporan-progres-murid.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the student progress report system. Guru fills monthly checklist-based reports per enrollment via portal; Admin/Owner downloads PDF. Requires 7 new migrations, 7 models, ReportTemplate CRUD, ProgressReportController, GuruController integration, and 10+ views.

nodes.name: 2026-06-02-replacement-honor-on-attendance.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for removing pre-filled honor on calendar replacement sessions. Replacement session honor_code and honor_amount should be null until attendance is recorded, matching the RescheduleService pattern. Includes backfill migration for existing data.

nodes.name: 2026-06-03-schedule-absensi-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for fixing 7 bugs in Schedule CRUD (multi-enrollment context) and Absensi DIGANTI (two-phase confirmation flow). Cluster A addresses false schedule conflicts, per-enrollment instrument display, route nesting. Cluster B adds DIGANTI honor pending with confirmSubstitute endpoint.

nodes.name: 2026-06-06-catatan-per-sesi-guru.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for structured session notes (Materi, Tugas/Latihan, Catatan) per ClassSession filled by teachers after teaching. SessionNoteSyncService aggregates notes into progress report snapshots. Includes PATCH route, collapsible UI, and read-only display in laporan form.

nodes.name: 2026-06-06-progress-report-pdf-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for redesigning the progress report PDF according to new mockups. Adds monthly ratings (Teknik/Materi/Reading/Repertoar), narrative notes, progress conclusion enum, manual progress bar, star-rating select components, and emoji instrument mapping config.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-manual-sessions.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for enabling admin to create manual sessions with attribution month, ensuring cross-month rescheduled sessions (rapel) appear in the correct month's progress report. Adds attribution_* and session_type columns, ManualSessionService, and controller.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-session-report-wa-student-template.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding a student-directed WhatsApp message template (SESSION_REPORT_STUDENT) that uses second-person 'kamu' tone when parent_phone is empty and the message falls back to the student's own phone number. Includes recipient type routing and encouragement line generation.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-session-report-wa.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for auto-sending WhatsApp session reports to parents after each lesson, with Fonnte integration, 10-minute debounce via queued jobs, guru UI status indicators, and admin log page with manual resend capability.
nodes.languageNotes: Detailed 7-task implementation plan with file maps, commit guidelines, and production checklist for Laravel 11 WhatsApp notification feature.

nodes.name: 2026-06-08-editable-encouragement-ui.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for enabling the Owner to edit 6 encouragement message lines (ratings 5/4/3/2/1 + default empty) in WhatsApp SESSION_REPORT templates via a JSON column and simple form UI.

nodes.name: 2026-06-08-scheduling-bug-fixes.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan fixing 8 scheduling bugs found during code review, covering conflict detection exclusions, DUO max-2 limits, teacher/room validation in replacement sessions, status transition guards, and session synchronization across weekly schedule updates.
nodes.languageNotes: Each bug task is independently fixable and individually committable, spanning SessionGeneratorService, AttendanceService, ScheduleController, and AbsensiController.

nodes.name: Edge Case Guards Design
nodes.summary: Design spec identifying and resolving 10 validation gaps across student lifecycle, financial, and scheduling domains. Covers preventive guards in StudentLifecycleService, InvoiceService, and SessionGeneratorService with severity ratings, fix strategies, and implementation priorities.

nodes.name: Import Excel Enrollment & Schedule Design
nodes.summary: Design spec extending the Excel import feature to automatically create enrollments, schedules, and student status histories during import confirmation. Adds kode_ruangan column to template with validation, enabling one-step migration of 300+ students with active schedules from the legacy system.

nodes.name: Import Murid from Excel Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for mass student data import from Excel (.xlsx) to migrate 300+ students from the legacy system. Specifies the upload-dry-run-preview-confirm flow using maatwebsite/excel, 2-sheet template, row-level validation with error categorization, overwrite detection, and audit logging.

nodes.name: Flexible Rooms & Auto-Suggest Schedule Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for migrating room facilities from boolean columns to supported_instruments JSON, adding instrument compatibility auto-suggest in schedule forms via Alpine.js, and hard-block validation in ScheduleController. Covers migration, RoomController updates, multi-checkbox form, and warning on facility edit.

nodes.name: M04 Daily Attendance Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for the daily attendance module (M04), implementing a UI for admin to input session statuses across ~1,200 monthly sessions. Covers 7 status buttons with grouping, mini-modals for late and substitute teacher input, server-side validation, badge colors, and integration with financial and honor modules.

nodes.name: Redesign Print Invoice & Kuitansi Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for redesigning the print layout of invoices, payment receipts (kuitansi), and honor slips. Specifies A5 size, mahogany-gold brand color palette, structured header sections, itemized tables, summary box, and footer with bank info and digital signature. Addresses both dark and light mode print output.

nodes.name: Honor Slip Unification Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for merging HonorSlip (M06 monthly) and EventHonorSlip (M08 per-event) into a single teacher_honor_slips table. Adds event_honor and event_honor_note columns to the existing slip, deletes the separate event_honor_slips infrastructure, and updates all views and controllers accordingly.

nodes.name: Tablet Support Owner Pages Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for retrofitting tablet-responsive layouts on five Owner-only pages (honors index/show, reports/finance, reports/students, audit-logs index, students index). Uses responsive tables with horizontal scroll, condensed card-like rows, and larger touch targets. Does not change layouts or business logic.

nodes.name: Student Leave (Cuti) Feature Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for the student leave (cuti) feature in M05. Adds cuti_from and cuti_until columns to students table, extends StudentLifecycleService with ajukanCuti() and aktifkanDariCuti() methods including enrollment ON_LEAVE transition, invoice guard, and session cancellation. Covers import, UI, renewal flow, and edge cases.

nodes.name: Discount Extension to Late Fees Design
nodes.summary: Design spec extending the existing discount feature to support discounting late fee (DENDA) items, adding a 90% cap on PERCENT discount type, and clarifying that only Owner can discount late fees. Updates DiscountService, invoice show view, and DiscountTest.

nodes.name: Invoice Discount Feature Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for adding per-item discounts on invoices via negative InvoiceItem entries with parent_item_id foreign key. Covers database migration with discount_type (NOMINAL/PERCENT) and discount_reason columns, new DiscountService and DiscountController, Alpine.js inline form UI, audit logging, and print view updates.

nodes.name: Weekly Schedule Calendar Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for a visual weekly schedule calendar (Fitur A). Specifies a dedicated ScheduleController, a Blade view with week navigator, filter bar (teacher/room/instrument), a time-slot grid, and an Alpine.js popup detail card for session info. Does not modify existing scheduling logic.

nodes.name: Multi-Class per Student Design
nodes.summary: Design spec allowing a single student to have multiple active class enrollments (e.g., Piano + Guitar). Removes package_id and related columns from students table, introduces primary_enrollment_id pointer, extends enrollments with ON_LEAVE status, links invoices per enrollment_id, and builds EnrollmentController with Tab Kelas UI.

nodes.name: Auto-Mundur & Notifications Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for implementing Laravel Database Notifications to warn about overdue students at risk of auto-withdrawal. Creates MuridOverdueNotification class, students:check-overdue Artisan command, ViewComposer for topbar badge and dropdown UI, and NotificationController for marking notifications as read.

nodes.name: Academic Calendar & Auto-Schedule Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for adding academic calendar support to session generation (M03). Adds replacement_date and is_honor_paid columns to holidays table, accompanying_teacher_id to event_participants table, updates SessionGeneratorService generateForSchedule() algorithm with academic calendar logic, and updates honor rules for LIBUR and IZIN_RESCHEDULE sessions.

nodes.name: Kids Bundle Installment UI Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for the UI displaying Kids Class Bundle installment progress across 3 terms. Adds installment group label in invoice index, progress panel in invoice show page, and installment card in student show page. Backend logic for generating 3 installment invoices is already complete.

nodes.name: Reschedule Phase 2 Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for automated reschedule (Phase 2) where admin can input replacement date/time/room directly from the attendance form. Creates new RescheduleService with conflict detection for teacher and room double-booking, handles H_IZIN zero-honor for original session and H_REG for replacement session, and supports cross-month rescheduling.

nodes.name: Simplify Create Student Form Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for simplifying the student creation form after multi-class migration. Removes package_id and assigned_teacher_id fields from the form and StoreStudentRequest since enrollment is no longer created at student creation. New students are always created as Calon status; enrollment is created later via lifecycle actions or Tab Kelas.

nodes.name: Honor Slip Per-Student Redesign Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for redesigning the teacher honor slip from per-honor-code grouping to per-student breakdown. Adds bank_account_holder column to teachers table, updates HonorCalculationService to group sessions by student, redesigns the print view with per-student rows, adds bank info to header, and uses Charly Nurjaya as hardcoded studio head signature.

nodes.name: Session Numbering Design
nodes.summary: Design spec for adding sequential session numbering per student per month (session_sequence) and origin_session_id for tracking split/rescheduled sessions. Updates SessionGeneratorService for numbering logic, RescheduleService for origin tracking, and adds label helpers displayed in attendance, student detail, and session list pages.

nodes.name: 2026-05-24-split-reschedule-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for the split reschedule feature, detailing the split_part column addition to class_sessions table, 15+15 minute split session logic, RescheduleService updates, and validation rules for partial session replacement.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-dashboard-admin-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for simplifying the Admin dashboard by removing Owner-only widgets (cash balance, aging piutang, unpaid honor slips) and replacing student statistics with a daily attendance list widget showing SCHEDULED sessions.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-honor-guru-pendamping-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for EventHonorService to auto-calculate honor for accompanying teachers at Konser KITA events, with H_PENDAMPING honor code (default Rp 250.000 flat per event), PayrollConfig integration, and slip injection logic.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-kids-class-import-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for importing Kids Class students from legacy Excel data, addressing KIDS_CLASS_BUNDLE installment billing setup and KIDS_CLASS monthly billing for existing mid-program students.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-nickname-unique-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for adding a unique constraint on students.nickname with two-layer validation: Laravel Form Request unique rule and MySQL unique index, including data cleanup of 9 duplicate nicknames.

nodes.name: 2026-05-26-uat-user-manual-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for generating UAT Checklist and Admin User Manual .docx documents using Python scripts (python-docx) for Musik KITA system go-live preparation, covering modules M01 through M08.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-izin-pending-open-slot.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for IZIN_PENDING session status allowing admin to record absence without immediate replacement date, plus Open Slot Board UI for teachers to see and fill freed time slots from other students.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-pisah-metode-bayar-laporan-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for splitting payment methods (CASH, TRANSFER, QRIS, DEBIT) in the financial report, replacing the old cash-vs-transfer breakdown with a grouped query by method in ReportController.

nodes.name: 2026-05-28-user-management-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for an Owner-only User Management page with CRUD operations, role assignment, modal-based add/edit/reset-password/hard-delete workflows, and sidebar entry with audit logging.

nodes.name: 2026-05-29-kids-fp-invoice-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for generating Kids Class Final Project invoice (KIDS_FP, Rp 140.000) manually from the student finance tab, with duplicate detection guards and Alpine.js confirmation modal.

nodes.name: 2026-05-30-kalender-nickname-cell-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for displaying student nickname as the primary identifier in calendar schedule grid cells, with fallback to the first word of full_name, supporting multi-enrollment sessions.

nodes.name: 2026-05-31-auto-pilih-template-laporan-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for auto-selecting progress report templates based on enrollment package type (REGULER, HOBBY, KIDS_CLASS) using a new template_kind column in report_templates, removing manual template dropdown.

nodes.name: 2026-05-31-laporan-progres-pdf-kartu-bulanan-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for a parent-friendly monthly progress report PDF redesigned as a Kartu Bulanan (monthly card) with narrative teacher feedback, visual progress summary, and structured session timeline.

nodes.name: 2026-05-31-students-index-multi-enrollment-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for showing multi-enrollment data in the students index table with stacked rows per package/teacher/schedule, using an activeEnrollments() relation ordered by is_primary DESC.

nodes.name: 2026-06-02-replacement-honor-on-attendance-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for deferring honor_code and honor_amount calculation on calendar replacement sessions from generation time to attendance time, aligning SessionGeneratorService behavior with manual reschedule flow.

nodes.name: 2026-06-03-schedule-absensi-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for fixing 7 bugs across schedule CRUD and DIGANTI attendance flow, including multi-enrollment support in the schedule tab, false conflict detection, instrument room filtering, and a two-phase DIGANTI confirmation process.

nodes.name: 2026-06-06-catatan-per-sesi-guru-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for per-session teacher notes with a new session_teacher_notes table storing material_learned, homework_notes, session_rating, with auto-sync to monthly progress reports via SessionNoteSyncService.

nodes.name: 2026-06-06-progress-report-pdf-redesign-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for redesigning the monthly progress report PDF with structured session note integration, manual teacher ratings (teknik, materi, reading, repertoar 1-5), progress bar 0-100%, and a four-state conclusion flow.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-manual-sessions-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for manual session creation per enrollment with attribution_month/year for cross-month rappel, adding session_type (REGULAR/MANUAL) enum and a POST API endpoint for admin to add sessions outside automatic generation.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-progress-report-pdf-polish-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for visual polish of the progress report PDF with corporate-neutral navy color palette, branded header, auto-generated report number (LMK/LPR/YYYY/MM/NNNN), progress bar rendering, and teacher signature section.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-progress-report-pdf-size-optimization-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for reducing the progress report PDF file size from 1,310 KB to under 150 KB through JPEG logo caching, font subsetting, single-font usage, and header layout redesign with a compact branded strip.

nodes.name: 2026-06-07-session-report-wa-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for an automatic WhatsApp session report system that sends lesson summaries to parents after each session, using a queue-based approach with a 10-minute debounce via the Fonnte gateway, including the session_report_wa_logs data model and teacher/admin UI details.
nodes.languageNotes: Design spec covers queue-based architecture with debounce, idempotency via updated_at snapshots, and feature-flag gating.

nodes.name: 2026-06-08-editable-encouragement-ui-design.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for enabling the Owner to edit the 6-variant encouragement messages (rating_5 through rating_1 plus default) used in WhatsApp session report templates, stored as a JSON column in whatsapp_message_templates with hardcoded fallback values.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: HTTP route definitions, controllers, and form request validation for all web endpoints

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Business logic services, queue jobs, notifications, and data export utilities

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: Eloquent models, database migrations, seeders, and test factories

layers.name: Presentation Layer
layers.description: Blade templates, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, Blade components, and UI mockups

layers.name: Console Layer
layers.description: Artisan CLI commands for scheduled tasks, session generation, and system maintenance

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: CLAUDE.md is the definitive project briefing for Musik KITA Operations, a Laravel-based music school management system serving approximately 300 students and 18 teachers. This document documents the complete system architecture, database schema, 11 business modules (M01-M11), critical business rules (BR), UI design system with mint-and-mahogany theme, RBAC roles, and coding conventions. It serves as the single source of truth before exploring any code.

tour.title: Application Entry and Routing
tour.description: The Laravel HTTP front controller at public/index.php bootstraps the entire application and dispatches every request. The central routes file at routes/web.php defines all application endpoints with RBAC middleware enforcing Owner, Admin, Auditor, and Guru role permissions across every module. The bootstrap/app.php configures middleware aliases for Spatie role/permission checks. Together these files form the gate through which every feature is accessed.

tour.title: Core Domain Models
tour.description: The data layer is built around five core Eloquent models that appear in nearly every feature. Student (fan-in of 77) represents enrolled individuals with multi-enrollment support via the Enrollment model, which bridges students to packages and teachers. Package defines tuition pricing and class types (REGULER, HOBBY, KIDS_CLASS, DUO) with helper methods for installments. These models form the conceptual vocabulary of the entire system -- every other module references them.
tour.languageLesson: Laravel Eloquent models define relationships, scopes, and accessors that encapsulate business logic. The Student model's primaryEnrollment() relationship demonstrates the strategy pattern for multi-class support -- instead of storing package_id on the student, the primary enrollment is a pointer to the enrollments table, allowing a student to hold multiple active enrollments simultaneously.

tour.title: Scheduling Foundation
tour.description: The scheduling system tracks two dimensions of time: recurring weekly schedules and concrete class sessions. The Schedule model defines fixed day-of-week and time slots per enrollment, mapping to Indonesian day names. The ClassSession model represents actual sessions on specific dates, tracking 10 attendance statuses, honor codes, and split-session support. Room and Teacher models provide the spatial and human resources that schedules bind together, with the Room model holding a supported_instruments JSON column for flexible instrument compatibility.
tour.languageLesson: JSON columns in MySQL (supported_instruments on rooms) provide schema flexibility without migration overhead. Eloquent casts them to arrays automatically, and the ScheduleConflictDetector queries them using JSON_CONTAINS for instrument compatibility checks.

tour.title: Session Generation and Conflict Detection
tour.description: The monthly session generator is the system's most important background process. SessionGeneratorService (fan-in of 11) implements academic calendar rules: generating sessions per enrollment, handling national holidays with replacement dates, enforcing the max-4-sessions-per-month rule, and applying honor codes for LIBUR sessions. The ScheduleConflictDetector prevents double-booking for both teachers and rooms using time overlap queries that are DUO-class aware. The GenerateMonthlySessions artisan command triggers this pipeline on a cron schedule.
tour.languageLesson: Laravel Artisan commands are scheduled via routes/console.php using the schedule() method. The hourly/daily frequency ensures session generation happens reliably without manual intervention. The conflict detector uses raw time-overlap SQL queries rather than loading all records into memory, keeping performance under 30 seconds for 300 students.

tour.title: Attendance and Rescheduling
tour.description: The attendance module (M04) is the operational heart of the system. AbsensiController provides a daily attendance page with inline AJAX status updates for each session. AttendanceService implements the 10 honor-code business rules (BR-4.1 through BR-4.10) -- determining whether a session earns H_REG, H_VIDEO, H_HANGUS, or the split-session H_SPLIT honor. RescheduleService handles Phase 2 rescheduling: when a student cancels with sufficient notice, the admin picks a replacement date/time/room and the service creates a replacement session with conflict validation.
tour.languageLesson: Service classes in Laravel extract complex business logic from controllers, keeping controllers thin and business rules testable. AttendanceService encapsulates the 10 honor-code scenarios as discrete methods, each implementing one BR-4 rule, making the logic auditable and modifiable without touching HTTP concerns.

tour.title: Student Finance and Invoicing
tour.description: The finance module (M05) handles the complete billing lifecycle. InvoiceService auto-generates SPP invoices on the 1st of each month for every active enrollment, applying late fines via a daily cron starting on the 11th. The Invoice model tracks multi-status lifecycle (UNPAID/PARTIAL/PAID/VOID) and supports Kids Class Bundle 3-term installments via installment_group_id. InvoiceItem supports manual items, NOMINAL/PERCENT discounts with required reason, and links to the invoice_components catalog managed by the Owner. Payment records support four methods: CASH, TRANSFER, QRIS, and DEBIT.
tour.languageLesson: Self-referencing foreign keys (parent_item_id on invoice_items) enable hierarchical data structures without separate junction tables. The DISKON item_code uses this pattern to link discount entries back to their parent SPP or DENDA items, supporting both flat-rate and percentage discount calculations.

tour.title: Teacher Honor System
tour.description: The honor module (M06) calculates teacher compensation from session data. HonorCalculationService iterates over confirmed sessions each month, applying the formula package_price * 50% / 4 per session, with distinct honor codes (H_REG, H_TRIAL, H_VIDEO, H_LIBUR, H_HANGUS, H_PENG, H_KIDS, H_UJIAN, H_IZIN, H_SPLIT) handling every attendance scenario. The HonorSlip model aggregates base honor (auto-calculated), event honor, transport honor, and other honor into a single monthly slip per teacher, with DRAFT/CALCULATED/PAID status and bank account details for printed slips.
tour.languageLesson: The 10 honor codes are VARCHAR strings rather than database enums, allowing the system to add new codes via application logic without running migrations. This design choice prioritizes deployment flexibility over strict schema enforcement.

tour.title: Student Lifecycle Management
tour.description: Student lifecycle management orchestrates the six-status state machine (CALON, TRIAL, AKTIF, CUTI, MUNDUR, SELESAI) with valid transition rules. StudentController provides comprehensive CRUD plus lifecycle actions: schedule trial, activate, skip-trial with mandatory reason, place on leave, withdraw, and re-activate. StudentLifecycleService encapsulates all transition logic, ensuring each status change triggers the correct side effects -- enrollment status updates, session cleanup, and invoice generation. The StudentStatusHistory model provides a complete audit trail of every state change.
tour.languageLesson: The student status state machine is implemented as explicit methods on the lifecycle service rather than a generic state machine library. Each transition method (activateFromTrial(), placeOnLeave(), withdraw()) is self-documenting and testable, with clear preconditions and post-conditions that match the business rules exactly.

tour.title: Events, Concerts, and Exams
tour.description: The event module (M08) manages Mini Concerts and exams, each with a full lifecycle from DRAFT to COMPLETED. EventController handles participant registration, exam result input with automatic grade progression, and event completion. The Event model tracks event type and dates, while EventParticipant links students to events with participation type, exam results, and accompanying teacher assignments. EventHonorService automatically injects Rp 250,000 honor for accompanying teachers when an event completes, via the H_PENDAMPING honor code.

tour.title: Dashboard and Reporting
tour.description: The dashboard and reporting layer provides business intelligence for the studio. DashboardController renders a real-time P&L view showing revenue, expenses, cash balance, student statistics, aging receivables, and unpaid honor slips, with role-based data visibility (Owner sees full financials; Admin sees operational metrics). ReportController generates filtered financial reports with payment method breakdowns (CASH, TRANSFER, QRIS, DEBIT) and export capabilities. The console route definitions in routes/console.php schedule all cron-based tasks: session generation, invoice creation, fine application, honor calculation, auto-mundur detection, and WhatsApp schedule reminders.
tour.languageLesson: Laravel's scheduler in routes/console.php centralizes all cron task definitions in one file. The ->dailyAt(), ->hourly(), and ->lastDayOfMonth() methods provide a readable DSL for scheduling, making it immediately clear when each background job runs.

tour.title: Teacher Portal
tour.description: The Guru portal (M10) extends the system with teacher self-service access. GuruController (fan-out of 39, the highest in the codebase) provides teacher login, today's schedule view, 2-week calendar, self-service attendance entry for own sessions, IZIN_PENDING date suggestions, and read-only honor slip access. The frontend uses Alpine.js (initialized in resources/js/app.js) for reactive UI components including the teacher dashboard with mobile-first layout and bottom navigation. This module was added after the initial Fase 1 release and represents the system's evolution toward multi-role access.
tour.languageLesson: Alpine.js provides reactive UI behavior without a full JavaScript framework. The app.js entry point registers Alpine components and ApexCharts globally, allowing Blade templates to use x-data, x-show, and x-on directives for interactive features like modals, dropdowns, and real-time filters.

tour.title: System Architecture Summary
tour.description: The Software Requirements Specification (SRS) documents the complete system architecture, detailing all 11 modules, the full database schema with every table and column, the service layer inventory, coding conventions, and the phased roadmap. This document ties together every component explored in this tour -- from the Eloquent models in Step 3 through the Guru portal in Step 12 -- showing how the system's layered architecture (routes -> controllers -> services -> models -> database) supports a music school managing 1200+ sessions per month across 9 studio rooms with 18 teachers.
